Name: search_news
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "search_news" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."search_news"($1) AS "_fn_search_news" WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM "auth"."users" f WHERE "_fn_search_news"."author_id" = f."id" AND f."display_name" = $2::text) ORDER BY "created_at" DESC) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."id" AS "id", "_root.base"."content" AS "content", "_root.r.author"."author" AS "author") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base" LEFT OUTER JOIN LATERAL (WITH "_root.r.author.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "auth"."users" WHERE "_root.base"."author_id" = "id" LIMIT 1) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.r.author.base"."display_name" AS "displayName") AS "_e")) AS "author" FROM "_root.r.author.base") AS "_root.r.author" ON ('true')) AS "_root"
